name: Thunkable No-Code Mobile App Builder API
what_it_does: No-code mobile app builder with drag-and-drop interface — enabling anyone to create native iOS and Android apps with block-based visual programming, component library, Firebase/Airtable/REST data integrations, and App Store publishing, particularly strong in education and simple consumer apps.
use_cases: Building native iOS and Android apps without coding using block-based logic
Integrating Firebase, Airtable, or custom REST APIs as data sources in Thunkable apps
Publishing simple consumer or internal apps to App Store and Google Play
Teaching mobile app development in educational settings with visual programming
Creating event apps, community apps, or directory apps without developers
not_for: Complex business applications (use Adalo or FlutterFlow for more capability)
High-performance consumer apps requiring native code (use React Native or Flutter)
Enterprise BPM or workflow automation (use Nintex or Appian)
best_when: A non-technical founder, educator, or small business needs to publish a simple native mobile app to iOS and Android App Stores quickly and inexpensively, with Firebase or Airtable as a data backend.
avoid_when: You need complex UI, advanced logic, high performance, or apps that will scale to thousands of users.

auth.notes: Thunkable API key for platform/project access. External REST API calls configured in Thunkable designer (Web API component). Firebase Auth for end-user auth in apps. No webhooks from Thunkable platform. Airtable API key configured in designer for data integration. Block-based logic for API call handling.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 1 private project, limited storage, Thunkable branding
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2015. Raised $30M Series B (2021). Backed by New Enterprise Associates, Owl Ventures. Originated as App Inventor spin-off (MIT). Education market strength — used in 5,000+ schools. iOS and Android publishing included. Block-based visual programming (similar to Scratch). 500K+ developers on platform.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: External API calls via Web API component in designer. Block-based logic for response handling. Limited platform API for programmatic project management. App designer is primary interface — not API-configurable. Education focus means simpler feature set than competing no-code builders.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Reads idempotent. External API calls depend on target API behavior. No Thunkable-specific idempotency guarantees.
known_agent_gotchas: Block-based programming — not suitable for complex conditional logic
Apple Developer Program ($99/year) required for iOS App Store publishing
Firebase required for user authentication in most production apps
COPPA compliance critical — Thunkable used in education with minors
Block logic has performance limitations for data-heavy operations

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. COPPA and GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth. COPPA compliance critical for educational use with minors. Firebase Auth for end-user authentication. External API keys configured in designer — store sensitive keys securely outside app.
